footer.tagline: Budget-first wellness, built for real life.
footer.disclaimerText: HealthPlanFactory is a wellness optimization and information platform only. It is not a licensed medical provider, health insurer, or regulated financial advisor. Nothing on this platform constitutes medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before beginning any wellness, fitness, or health program. For medical emergencies, call {{emergencyNum}}. For mental health crisis support, call or text {{crisisNum}}. HSA/FSA eligibility is determined by your plan administrator — consult your plan documents before assuming eligibility. Provider listings are for informational purposes only. HealthPlanFactory does not endorse, verify credentials of, or guarantee results from any listed provider. Use of this platform is subject to our

hero.headline: Your personalized wellness plan, built around your budget.
hero.sub: HealthPlanFactory combines AI-driven prioritization, evidence-rated modalities, and real local providers to build you a wellness plan you can actually afford and follow.

stats.stat1Desc: of adults want a structured wellness plan but don't know where to start or what they can afford.
stats.stat2Desc: spent on healthcare annually in the US — yet most spend zero on preventive wellness each year.
stats.stat3Desc: of HSA/FSA holders don't know many wellness services qualify for tax-advantaged spending.

howItWorks.headline: From intake to action plan in minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share your health goals, current conditions, monthly budget, and lifestyle preferences. Takes about 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes your inputs and assembles a prioritized list of wellness modalities fitted to your budget and goals.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Browse matched providers for each modality in your plan. Unlock contact info for the ones that interest you.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Book sessions directly, log your routine, and watch your wellness score improve over time.

modalities.headline: 12+ evidence-rated wellness categories.
modalities.sub: Every modality is scored against peer-reviewed research. Our AI matches you only to the categories most likely to help your specific goals.

pricing.headline: See your full plan free. Pay only for the providers you choose.
pricing.explorerDesc: Build your plan, browse providers, and see what's possible.
pricing.plusDesc: Connect with real providers and turn your plan into action.
pricing.providerDesc: Get discovered by members whose plans match your specialty.

faq.headline: Common questions.
faq.a1: No. HealthPlanFactory is a wellness optimization platform — not a medical provider, diagnostic tool, or substitute for licensed healthcare. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before beginning any wellness program.
faq.q2: How much does it cost to get started?
faq.a2: Building your initial plan is completely free. You pay unlock fees ($3–$8) only when you want to view a specific provider's contact information. A Plus membership ($9.99/month) unlocks unlimited reveals, journaling, routine building, and the AI accountability coach.
faq.q3: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
faq.a3: Many services in your plan — including massage, acupuncture, physical therapy, and nutrition counseling — may qualify for HSA/FSA reimbursement. Eligibility is determined by your plan administrator. Our platform includes an HSA/FSA log to help you track spending.
faq.a4: Providers apply to be listed and agree to our provider standards. We collect credential information and license numbers. However, HealthPlanFactory does not independently verify credentials or guarantee outcomes. Always do your own due diligence before booking.
faq.q5: What's the difference between a wellness provider and a physician provider?
faq.a5: Wellness providers include massage therapists, yoga instructors, nutritionists, personal trainers, and similar practitioners. Physician providers are licensed MDs, DOs, and NPs — often Direct Primary Care physicians who can order labs, prescribe, and write Letters of Medical Necessity that may unlock HSA/FSA spending for wellness services.
faq.q6: What is the Founding Provider program?
faq.a6: Founding Providers who join during our early access period pay zero platform commission on bookings for their first 90 days. After that, a small commission applies to bookings made through the platform.

cta.headline: Ready to take control of your wellness?
cta.sub: Build your personalized plan in 5 minutes — free.

hero.headline: A plan you can actually afford and follow.
hero.sub: HealthPlanFactory takes you from a 5-minute intake to a prioritized, budget-aware wellness roadmap — with matched local providers at every step.

step1.title: Tell us about yourself
bullets: Set your monthly wellness budget — we optimize every recommendation to it.
Choose your health goals (fitness, stress relief, sleep, chronic pain, and more).
Flag any conditions or concerns so the AI can prioritize the right modalities.
Share your location and how you prefer to engage — in-person, virtual, or both.

step2.title: Your plan is assembled
bullets: Every modality in our evidence library is scored against your goals and conditions.
The engine allocates your budget across the highest-scoring modalities — like a financial planner, but for wellness.
Modalities that don't fit your budget this cycle are kept in a 'next cycle' queue so nothing is lost.
HSA/FSA eligibility is flagged automatically for every item in your plan.

step3.title: Discover matched providers
bullets: Local providers who match each modality in your plan are surfaced — you'll never see irrelevant listings.
Each provider card shows their specialty, session rate, HSA/FSA acceptance, and rating.
You can browse provider names, modalities, and ratings for free — contact details are locked.
Plus members see everything unlocked; Explorer members pay a small à la carte fee per reveal.

step4.title: Unlock, book & track
step4.tagline: Pay only for what you want
bullets: Unlock a provider's contact info with a single click — app-based $3 · wellness $5 · physician $8.
Referral credits (earned when you invite friends) can cover the unlock fee entirely.
Log sessions directly on your plan page and watch your wellness score climb over time.
Your AI accountability coach (Plus) sends nudges and helps you stay on track between sessions.

faq.headline: How it really works
faq.q1: How long does the intake take?
faq.a1: About 5 minutes. There are 7 short screens: budget, goals, conditions, preferences, exclusions, location, and a final review. You can go back and change any answer before generating your plan.
faq.q2: Can I edit my plan after it's generated?
faq.a2: Yes. You can re-run the intake at any time with updated inputs — your new plan replaces the previous one. Plus members also have access to a manual routine builder where they can adjust modality frequency and budgets directly.
faq.q3: Do I need to pay anything to see my plan?
faq.a3: No. Your full personalized wellness plan — with every modality, cost estimate, and HSA/FSA flag — is completely free. You only pay when you choose to unlock a specific provider's contact information.
faq.q4: What happens when I unlock a provider?
faq.a4: You immediately see the provider's full contact details, website, and booking link. Explorer members pay a small à la carte fee per unlock ($3–$8 depending on provider type). Plus members get unlimited unlocks at no extra cost.
faq.q5: What if there are no providers near me?
faq.a5: Many modalities include telehealth or app-based options that work anywhere. If local in-person providers are sparse in your area, the plan will surface remote-friendly alternatives and flag them clearly.

stats.stat3Label: To build and view your full plan

founder.headline: Built from a personal frustration.
founder.p1: A few years ago I woke up and couldn't move my left leg. Sciatica — overnight, no warning. What followed was months of trying everything one at a time: chiropractors, massage therapy, steroid injections, inversion therapy, decompression therapy, acupuncture. Each one helped a little, or not at all, or for a week before the pain came back.
founder.p2: I spent thousands of dollars with no roadmap — just a pile of appointments and a lot of hope. It eventually resolved. But I always wondered: what if I’d had a more calculated approach from the start?
founder.p3: HealthPlanFactory is what I wish had existed. A platform that takes your goals, your budget, and your specific situation seriously — and gives you a real roadmap instead of a generic recommendation or an expensive consult.

values.headline: How we think about wellness.
values.value1Body: Most wellness platforms ignore your wallet. We built every recommendation engine around your budget — not the other way around.
values.value2Body: Every modality in our library is scored against clinical and peer-reviewed literature — no pseudoscience, no affiliate-driven hype.
values.value3Body: You see the full plan for free. You pay only to unlock individual provider contact details — never for the plan itself.
values.value4Body: We surface vetted practitioners in your area — massage therapists, acupuncturists, coaches, and more — not faceless apps or generic referrals.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions.
faq.sub: Everything you need to know about how HealthPlanFactory works.
faq.a1: No. HealthPlanFactory is a wellness optimization platform — not a medical provider, diagnostic tool, or substitute for licensed healthcare. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before beginning any wellness program.
faq.q2: How much does it cost to get started?
faq.a2: Building your initial plan is completely free. You pay small unlock fees ($1–$3) only when you want to view a specific provider's contact information. A Plus membership ($9.99/month) unlocks unlimited reveals, journaling, routine building, and the AI accountability coach.
faq.q3: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
faq.a3: Many services in your plan — including massage, acupuncture, physical therapy, and nutrition counseling — may qualify for HSA/FSA reimbursement. Eligibility is determined by your plan administrator. Our platform includes an HSA/FSA log to help you track spending.
faq.a4: Providers apply to be listed and agree to our provider standards. We collect credential information and license numbers. However, HealthPlanFactory does not independently verify credentials or guarantee outcomes. Always do your own due diligence before booking.
faq.q5: What's the difference between wellness and physician providers?
faq.a5: Wellness providers include massage therapists, yoga instructors, nutritionists, personal trainers, and similar practitioners. Physician providers are licensed MDs, DOs, and NPs — often Direct Primary Care physicians who can order labs, prescribe, and write Letters of Medical Necessity.
faq.q6: What is the AI accountability coach?
faq.a6: The AI coach is powered by Claude (Anthropic) and helps you stay on track with your wellness plan. It provides personalized encouragement, answers questions about your modalities, and helps you build habits. It is not a therapist or medical provider. All conversations include an emergency keyword interceptor that surfaces crisis resources if needed.
faq.a7: We take privacy seriously. Your intake data, journal entries, and health information are used only to build and improve your plan. We do not sell personal health data to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
faq.q8: What is the Founding Provider program?
faq.a8: Founding Providers who join during our early access period pay zero platform commission on bookings for their first 90 days. After that, a small commission applies to bookings made through the platform.

hsaUnlock.title: Unlock Your HSA/FSA
hsaUnlock.sub: Many wellness services in your plan may qualify for tax-advantaged HSA or FSA spending. Here's how to maximize your benefits.
hsaUnlock.signInPrompt: Sign in to unlock your HSA savings
hsaUnlock.whatIsLmn: What is a Letter of Medical Necessity?
hsaUnlock.whatIsDpc: What is a Direct Primary Care physician?
hsaUnlock.whatIsBody: A Letter of Medical Necessity (LMN) is a document from a licensed physician that certifies a wellness service is medically necessary. With an LMN, many services that wouldn't normally qualify become HSA/FSA eligible.
hsaUnlock.step1: Find a Direct Primary Care (DPC) physician in your plan
hsaUnlock.step3: Explain your wellness goals and conditions
hsaUnlock.step4: Ask your physician to write an LMN for applicable services
hsaUnlock.disclaimer: HSA/FSA eligibility is determined by your plan administrator. An LMN does not guarantee eligibility. Always consult your plan documents.

lmnGuide.title: LMN Guide
lmnGuide.sub: Understanding Letters of Medical Necessity for HSA/FSA reimbursement.
lmnGuide.body: A Letter of Medical Necessity (LMN) is written by a licensed physician and certifies that a particular wellness service is medically necessary for your specific health condition. With a valid LMN on file, your HSA or FSA plan administrator may approve reimbursement for services not typically covered.
lmnGuide.heroH1: Unlock HSA/FSA Reimbursement for Wellness with a Letter of Medical Necessity
lmnGuide.heroP: Most people don't know that massage, physical therapy, yoga, acupuncture, and other wellness services may qualify for tax-free HSA/FSA reimbursement — when supported by an LMN from a physician.
lmnGuide.whatIsH2: What is a Letter of Medical Necessity?
lmnGuide.whatIsP1: A Letter of Medical Necessity (LMN) is a signed document from a licensed physician that certifies a specific wellness service is medically necessary for your condition or health goals. When your HSA or FSA administrator receives an LMN, eligible services that might otherwise be denied become reimbursable.
lmnGuide.whatIsP2: The IRS allows HSA/FSA reimbursement for services that are primarily for treatment of a medical condition — an LMN from your physician is the documentation that makes this possible.
lmnGuide.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Health Plan Factory is a wellness referral platform, not a medical provider. We do not write, review, or guarantee LMNs. Always consult your physician and HSA/FSA administrator regarding eligibility. Tax rules vary; consult a tax professional for advice.
lmnGuide.qualifyH2: Wellness Modalities That May Qualify with an LMN
lmnGuide.qualifyP: These are modalities that physicians commonly support with LMNs for HSA/FSA reimbursement. Eligibility depends on your specific medical situation and HSA/FSA plan.
lmnGuide.defaultMod0Desc: Often prescribed for chronic pain, muscle tension, and recovery.
lmnGuide.defaultMod1Desc: Widely supported for injury recovery, chronic pain, and mobility.
lmnGuide.defaultMod2Desc: May qualify for anxiety, chronic pain, and mental health conditions.
lmnGuide.defaultMod3Desc: Supported for chronic pain, migraines, and certain conditions.
lmnGuide.defaultMod4Desc: Broadly HSA/FSA eligible and often LMN-supported.
lmnGuide.defaultMod5Desc: May qualify with documented medical necessity.
lmnGuide.dpcH2: How Direct Primary Care Physicians Help
lmnGuide.dpcP: Direct Primary Care (DPC) physicians operate outside traditional insurance networks, which means they typically have more time for comprehensive, personalized care. Because DPC doctors develop deep familiarity with your health history, they are well-positioned to document when wellness services are medically necessary for you specifically.
lmnGuide.dpc0Desc: Flat monthly fee with no per-visit copays — more time with your doctor.
lmnGuide.dpc1Desc: DPC physicians know your history well enough to support LMN documentation.
lmnGuide.dpc2Desc: DPC physicians can write LMNs for qualifying wellness services in your plan.
lmnGuide.dpc3Desc: Many DPC physicians offer telehealth — get your LMN without leaving home.
lmnGuide.stepsH2: How to Get Your LMN in 4 Steps
lmnGuide.step0Desc: Use Health Plan Factory to create a plan based on your goals, conditions, and budget. The plan identifies which of your modalities may be LMN-eligible.
lmnGuide.step1Title: Connect with a DPC physician through HPF
lmnGuide.step1Desc: Browse vetted DPC providers on Health Plan Factory. Your plan shows an LMN callout for physicians who can help unlock reimbursement for your specific items.
lmnGuide.step2Desc: After connecting with a DPC physician, HPF auto-creates a pre-filled draft message you can send to your physician requesting an LMN for your plan's eligible services.
lmnGuide.step3Desc: Once your physician writes the LMN, submit it with your receipts to your HSA/FSA administrator. HPF tracks your sessions and flags eligible ones with an 'LMN on file' badge.
lmnGuide.ctaH2: See How Much Your Plan Could Save with an LMN
lmnGuide.ctaP: Build a free personalized wellness plan in 3 minutes. We'll show you exactly which modalities in your plan may be LMN-eligible and estimate your potential annual HSA/FSA savings.

calculator.heading: ROI Calculator
calculator.sub: Estimate your program's financial return using industry research averages. Edit inputs to match your organization.
calculator.disclaimer: Disclaimer: All inputs are editable to reflect your organization's actual data. Research-based defaults: Sick-day reduction default (2.0 days/yr): RAND Corporation, Wellness Programs in the Workplace (2013). Productivity gain default (2.5%): Berry, Mirabito & Baun (2010), Harvard Business Review. Estimates are illustrative — actual results vary by organization, demographics, and program engagement.

signup.licenseNote: License info is used for verification and not shown publicly.
signup.radiusNote: Leave blank if you only see patients at your office
signup.inPersonDesc: Members can book appointments at your location
signup.telehealthDesc: Expand your reach to members statewide
signup.availabilityNote: Shown on your public profile to help members plan appointments.
signup.insuranceFilter: Shown as a filter on member search
signup.step4P: Your profile has been submitted and is pending review. Set up your monthly listing to go live when approved.
signup.planItem0: Active listing visible to all members
signup.planItem1: Lead notifications when members view your profile
signup.planItem2: Provider dashboard to manage availability & pricing
signup.stripeNote: Secured by Stripe. Your listing activates after admin approval — you won't be charged until then.
signup.foundingDesc: Providers who join during our early access period pay 0% commission on bookings for 90 days. After that, a small platform fee applies. Limited spots available.

errors.serviceFormatRequired: Select at least one service format

leads.title: My Leads
leads.noLeads: No leads yet — make sure your profile is complete and approved.

preview.title: Listing Preview
preview.sub: This is how members see your profile.

hero.headline: Get discovered by members who already want what you offer.
hero.sub: Members build their wellness plans before they find you — so when they view your profile, they've already decided they need your modality. No cold outreach. High-intent leads.

highIntent.title: High-intent leads
highIntent.desc: Members view your profile after including your modality in their plan — the highest intent possible.

booking.title: Booking calendar
booking.desc: Accept bookings directly through the platform with integrated calendar and confirmation flow.

founding.title: Founding Program
founding.desc: Early providers get 0% commission on all bookings through the platform for the first 90 days.

hero.headline: A personalized wellness benefit your team will actually use.
hero.sub: Stop paying for generic gym memberships nobody redeems. Health Plan Factory builds each employee a custom wellness plan fitted to their budget, conditions, and goals — with HSA/FSA guidance built in.

why.title: A benefit your employees will actually use
why.sub: Generic wellness programs have 5–15% participation. Health Plan Factory is personalized from day one — each employee builds their own plan based on their own health goals.

customPlans.title: Custom plans per employee
customPlans.desc: Every team member answers a short health intake. The engine builds a prioritized, costed plan — their conditions, their budget, their goals.

hsaGuidance.title: HSA/FSA guidance built in
hsaGuidance.desc: Each plan flags which modalities are HSA/FSA-eligible and surfaces LMN guidance where applicable — turning benefits dollars into real spending.

dashboard.title: Employer wellness dashboard
dashboard.desc: Aggregate engagement data, team wellness score trends, and modality adoption rates — without individual privacy exposure.

zeroAdmin.title: Zero admin burden
zeroAdmin.desc: No per-use approvals. No reimbursement paperwork. Employees manage their own plans; you get a monthly usage report.

employee.title: Each employee builds their own plan. You fund the benefit.
employee.sub: Team members complete a 5-minute health intake — their goals, budget, and conditions. The engine assembles a prioritized wellness plan and surfaces the right providers near them.

s1.title: Intake & plan generation
s1.desc: 5-minute health questionnaire → AI-assembled plan with ranked modalities.

s2.title: Provider matching
s2.desc: Members browse vetted, in-network providers near them — pre-filtered by their plan.

s3.title: HSA/FSA spending guidance
s3.desc: The platform flags eligible services and generates LMN documentation where applicable.

s4.title: Monthly reporting to HR
s4.desc: You receive aggregate participation data and wellness score trends — no individual data.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: Per-seat. No usage fees. No per-approval admin overhead.
pricing.pricingNote: Pricing shown is indicative. Final pricing confirmed during demo call. Annual billing required. Minimum 10 seats.

demo.title: Request a demo
demo.sub: We'll walk you through the employer portal and answer any questions. No sales pressure.
demo.name: Your name
demo.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your team's wellness goals or any questions you have…
demo.noSpam: No spam. We'll respond within 1 business day.
demo.successSub: Check your inbox — we've sent a confirmation to {{email}}. Our team will follow up within 1 business day.
demo.signIn: Sign in to your employer portal →

bookmarks.title: Saved Providers
bookmarks.sub: Providers you’ve bookmarked for your plan
bookmarks.emptySub: Browse the provider directory and save providers that match your plan.
bookmarks.removeSuccessSub: Provider removed from your saved list.

listYourPractice.badge: ✦ Founding Provider Program — 0% commission for 90 days
listYourPractice.heroH1:
List your practice.
Reach members who want what you offer.
listYourPractice.heroP: Health Plan Factory connects wellness providers with high-intent members who have already decided they need your specialty. Start at <1>{{price}}</1> — cancel anytime.
listYourPractice.howItWorksH2: From application to first lead in 2 days
listYourPractice.whyChooseH2: Everything you need to grow your practice
listYourPractice.pricingNote: Payment collected after your profile is submitted. Listing goes live after admin approval.
listYourPractice.ctaP: Join hundreds of wellness providers already connecting with motivated members. Start today for just {{price}}.
listYourPractice.benefit0Desc: Members find you after building a plan that already includes your modality — the highest intent possible.
listYourPractice.benefit1Desc: Get discovered by wellness-focused members actively looking for providers like you. No cold outreach needed.
listYourPractice.benefit2Desc: Early providers get 0% commission on all platform bookings for the first 90 days. Limited spots available.
listYourPractice.benefit3Desc: Your credentials are reviewed by our team, building trust with members before they even reach out.
listYourPractice.benefit4Desc: Update your availability, pricing, and specialties any time from your provider dashboard.
listYourPractice.benefit5Desc: Members can filter for providers who accept HSA and FSA payments — get found by those who need you most.
listYourPractice.step0Desc: Tell us about your practice, modalities, location, and credentials.
listYourPractice.step1Desc: A simple {{price}} subscription keeps your profile active and your leads flowing.
listYourPractice.step2Desc: Our team reviews your credentials and activates your listing within 1–2 business days.
listYourPractice.step3Desc: Members with matching wellness plans can view your profile and reach out directly.
listYourPractice.faq0Q: How much does it cost to list my practice?
listYourPractice.faq0A: The listing fee is {{price}}. This covers your active profile, lead visibility, and dashboard access. There is no commission on bookings for the first 90 days as part of our Founding Provider Program.
listYourPractice.faq1A: Our team reviews submitted profiles within 1–2 business days. You'll receive an email confirmation when your listing goes live.
listYourPractice.faq2Q: What happens if my application is rejected?
listYourPractice.faq2A: If we can't approve your application, we'll let you know why. Common reasons include incomplete credentials or a mismatch with our current modality catalog. You're always welcome to reapply.
listYourPractice.faq3A: Yes. You can cancel your listing subscription at any time from your provider dashboard. Your profile will remain active until the end of the billing period.
listYourPractice.faq4A: We support a wide range of evidence-based wellness modalities including massage therapy, acupuncture, chiropractic care, yoga, nutrition counseling, functional medicine, and more. Browse our Modalities catalog to see the full list.

modalities.title: Modalities
modalities.heroP: Every modality rated by research evidence and cross-referenced with your health conditions and budget.
modalities.ctaH2: Ready to build your personalized plan?
modalities.ctaP: Answer a few questions and get a plan from these modalities tailored to your goals and budget.

employerPortal.heroH1: Give your team a personalized wellness benefit they'll actually use
employerPortal.heroP: Health Plan Factory delivers AI-curated wellness plans. Fund a monthly stipend and employees choose the therapies that work for them — from massage to physical therapy to mindfulness.
employerPortal.formP: Set up your company's wellness stipend program.
employerPortal.signInRequired: You need to be signed in.
employerPortal.platformFee: Platform fee: 8% per invoice. Total monthly billed = employees × stipend × 1.08. Cancel any time.
employerPortal.successP: Your employer account is live. Share the invite code below with your team.
employerPortal.inviteCodeHint: Employees enter this at sign-up or in their profile settings
employerPortal.billingConfigured: Billing configured. You can update payment details from the dashboard.
employerPortal.checkoutError: Unable to create billing session. Please try again.
employerPortal.checkoutSetupError: Could not initiate billing setup — you can complete it from the dashboard.
